hero.name: Neon Phantom
hero.concept: A cybernetic street racer emerging from neon-lit darkness, leaving trails of electric blue and magenta energy

visual_elements.appearance: Athletic build, wearing sleek black cybernetic suit with glowing circuit patterns
visual_elements.effects: Energy trails from hands and feet, glowing eyes, particle sparks
visual_elements.environment: Dark urban alley with neon signs, wet pavement reflections, atmospheric fog
visual_elements.lighting: High contrast chiaroscuro, neon rim lighting, volumetric fog

motion_profile.timing: Synced to bass beats (0.8x speed for dramatic effect)
motion_profile.camera: Low angle tracking shot, slight Dutch tilt

hero.personality: Mysterious, powerful, untouchable - the underground champion
hero.target_audience: 18-34, tech-savvy, gamers, cyberpunk fans, street culture
viral_hooks: First 3 seconds: Glowing eyes appear in darkness
5 second mark: First energy trail appears
8 second mark: Full reveal with neon explosion
Final frame: Direct eye contact with viewer

ai_prompts.midjourney_character: full body shot of cybernetic street racer, sleek black suit with glowing blue circuit patterns, electric blue and magenta energy trails, glowing eyes, standing in dark neon-lit alley, wet pavement reflections, atmospheric fog, cinematic lighting, high contrast, rim lighting, 8k, hyperrealistic --ar 9:16 --style raw --q 2
ai_prompts.runway_video: cybernetic street racer walking slowly towards camera in dark neon alley, electric blue and magenta energy trails flowing from body, glowing eyes, atmospheric fog, wet pavement reflections, cinematic slow motion, low angle shot, dramatic lighting --ar 9:16 --motion 8
ai_prompts.pika_video: mysterious figure emerging from darkness, glowing blue eyes appear first, then cybernetic suit with neon circuit patterns becomes visible, energy trails swirl around body, dark urban alley background, neon signs reflecting on wet ground, cinematic reveal --ar 9:16
ai_prompts.stable_diffusion_bg: dark urban alley at night, neon signs in blue and magenta, wet pavement with reflections, atmospheric fog, volumetric lighting, cyberpunk aesthetic, no people --ar 9:16

scenes.action: Darkness, then glowing blue eyes appear in the shadows
scenes.effects: Eyes glow intensifies, subtle particle sparks

scenes.action: Silhouette emerges from fog, circuit patterns start glowing
scenes.music: Bass drop hits, rhythmic beat starts
scenes.effects: Neon circuits activate on suit, fog swirls

scenes.action: Full figure revealed, walking forward with energy trails
scenes.effects: Electric blue and magenta trails flow from body, sparks fly

scenes.action: Close-up on face, direct eye contact with viewer
scenes.effects: Eyes glow brighter, energy aura pulses

scenes.action: Explosion of neon energy, fade to black
scenes.music: Final bass hit with reverb tail
scenes.effects: Neon explosion, particle burst, fade out

music_direction.search_terms: cyberpunk, dark synthwave, bass heavy, neon, futuristic
